examples: The wreckage of the Union Carbide pesticide plant continues to leach deadly chemicals into the water supply.
By the glow of a small carbide lamp one could distinguish a dozen human figures gathered around three or four tables.
We all know what the world's worst industrial disaster was: the gas leak from the Union Carbide factory in Bhopal in central India.
Fifty thousand years ago, a meteor carrying trace amounts of silicone carbide crashed into present-day Arizona.
The agreement represented a full and final settlement of Union Carbide's civil and criminal liabilities.
